data.title: ReposiTrak adds 20 beverage suppliers to traceability network, sharing FDA-required Key Data Elements.
data.description: Salt Lake City - Today, ReposiTrak, the global leader in food traceability and compliance networks, revealed that 20 beverage suppliers who distribute through a top natural and specialty foods distributor are set to join the ReposiTrak Traceability Network®. These suppliers will utilize ReposiTrak's inventory management and out-of-stock reduction software platform to share FDA-mandated Key Data Elements (KDEs) for every Critical Tracking Event. The company's stock (NYSE: TRAK) was mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Italian grocery retailer Multicedi uses Armis Centrix to enhance cybersecurity, addressing issues proactively. Director praises effectiveness.
data.description: In San Francisco today, Armis, a cybersecurity company, revealed that Multicedi, a major grocery retail group in Central and Southern Italy, has adopted Armis Centrix™, the Cyber Exposure Management Platform, to enhance its cybersecurity defense. According to Livio De Prisco, Information Systems Director at Multicedi, previously, crucial problems were only tackled after malfunctions or unusual incidents had taken place. This move aims to prevent such occurrences in the future and improve the organization's security protocols.

data.title: Magellan Jets launches Magellan Jets Journeys program for Private Clients with exclusive travel experiences beyond flying.
data.description: Magellan Jets, a prominent private aviation company based in Boston, has introduced a new program called Magellan Jets Journeys. This initiative is designed to provide unique travel experiences for the company's Private Clients. With Journeys, clients can access exclusive travel escapes that go beyond just flying. These personalized trips are meticulously planned by Magellan Jets to deliver top-tier hospitality from the aircraft to the final destination. The program includes special collaborations for unforgettable experiences.

data.title: Cargill recognized with 2026 BIG Innovation Award in Innovative Organizations category with 159 other companies, leaders.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Cargill was recently recognized as a leading innovator in the 2026 BIG Innovation Awards by the Business Intelligence Group. The company was named a Top 10 Innovator and awarded in the Innovative Organizations category. This accolade acknowledges Cargill's commitment to innovation within the global food and agriculture sector. Among 159 companies, products, and individuals driving change through applied innovation, Cargill stood out for its disciplined approach. This recognition highlights Cargill's significant contributions to transforming industries and driving measurable real-world impact.

data.title: Ziff Davis to join Susquehanna 15th Annual Technology Conference on Feb 26, 2026 in NY. (NASDAQ: ZD)
data.description: Ziff Davis, Inc. revealed its involvement in an upcoming investor conference in February. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ZD, will be participating in the Susquehanna 15th Annual Technology Conference. This event is scheduled to take place at the Lotte New York Palace in New York City on February 26, 2026. Ziff Davis is a specialized digital media and internet firm with a diverse portfolio encompassing prominent brands in technology, shopping, and gaming sectors. The conference will not have a webcast for the formal presentation.

data.title: 3 firms combine to form OptimaFI in Memphis, serving 2,500 clients. Offers data-driven solutions in marketing, credit risk, liquidity management.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee, three top firms with almost 40 years of experience in serving community financial institutions have merged to create OptimaFI. With a clientele of over 2,500, OptimaFI utilizes various data sets to offer cost-effective, rapidly deployable solutions in marketing, credit risk, and liquidity management. This collaboration involves Infusion Marketing Group and two other firms, providing expert guidance to clients in the industry.

data.title: Block, Inc. provides over $200 billion in credit to customers globally through various credit products, addressing lending gaps.
data.description: Today, Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) revealed that it has granted over $200 billion to customers worldwide through its various credit products like Cash App Borrow, Afterpay, and Square Loans. This showcases that inclusive lending and responsible risk assessment can coexist when supported by advanced technology. Block's efforts highlight a shift towards sustainable credit practices for upcoming generations.

data.title: TeleMate introduces next-gen UC&C observability platform in Atlanta, offering enterprise-scale performance and WebRTC insight.
data.description: In Atlanta, TeleMate has introduced a cutting-edge UC&C observability platform that offers enterprise-level performance, comprehensive WebRTC analysis, and visibility across multiple vendors. This next-generation platform is set to revolutionize the industry with its advanced features and capabilities.

data.title: monday.com (NASDAQ: MNDY) will report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 9, 2026, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: monday.com (NASDAQ: MNDY) has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for Q4 2025 on February 9, 2026. The management of monday.com is set to conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the very day. Further details concerning the company's financial outcomes and the live webcast for the call can be accessed on monday.com’s investor relations website, available at https://i.

data.title: Elon Musk's X releases algorithm powering 'For You' feed to address spam and AI image concerns on social media.
data.description: The social media platform has made a move towards transparency in the midst of controversies surrounding platform spam and non-consensual AI images. This decision comes as a response to escalating concerns over privacy and content moderation. The platform has disclosed that it removed a total of 10,000 spam accounts and deleted 5,000 non-consensual AI images in the past month alone. This action is part of their efforts to address these contentious issues and regain user trust.
IAEA SAYS CHERNOBYL NPP IN UKRAINE LOST ALL OFF-SITE POWER

data.title: AECOM sets Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings release for Feb 9, conference call on Feb 10 at 8am ET.
data.description: Dallas-based infrastructure leader AECOM (NYSE: ACM) is set to release its Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings on February 9, 2026, post-market closure in the U.S. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast for analysts and investors on February 10, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET / 7 a.m. CT to discuss financial results, strategic achievements, and market updates.

data.title: Magnachip launches high-efficiency IGBT series for solar inverters & ESS, including 650V & 1200V products. Strengthening market position.
data.description: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation introduced a new series of Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistors (IGBTs) aimed at solar inverters and industrial Energy Storage Systems (ESS) markets. This move solidifies Magnachip's presence in the high-efficiency power semiconductor sector. The company launched 650V and 1200V new Generation Discrete IGBT products tailored for solar inverters and ESS applications. This development showcases Magnachip's commitment to expand its offerings in the power semiconductor industry.

data.title: The GEO Group to announce Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 12, before market opens, with conference call scheduled at 1:00 PM ET.
data.description: Boca Raton based company, The GEO Group, Inc. (NYSE:GEO), is set to announce its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 12, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for 1:00 PM (Eastern Time) on the same day, with key figures like George Zoley, the Executive Chairman of the Board, J. David Donahue, the Chief Executive Officer, and Mark Suchinski, the Chief Financial Officer, hosting the call. The company's performance in this quarter will be closely watched by investors and analysts as they seek insights into GEO's financial health and future prospects.

data.title: Garmin introduces Xero L60i rangefinder with GPS and mapping technology for precise targeting.359 characters.
data.description: Garmin, a global provider of navigation technology, has introduced a groundbreaking innovation that combines laser target marking with precise location mapping and advanced navigation tools. This immersive experience, which utilizes augmented reality technology, allows users to mark targets with a laser and then accurately maneuver towards them using high-resolution digital maps. This development, announced on January 20, 2026, in Olathe, Kansas, is set to redefine how users interact with their surroundings. Garmin's stock, traded as GRMN on the New York Stock Exchange, is positioned to benefit from this new advancement in laser rangefinding capabilities.

data.title: Fastenal reports 2025 Q4 earnings, with revenues in the millions, focusing on industrial and construction supplies.
data.description: Winona, Minnesota-based Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST), an industry leader in the wholesale distribution of industrial and construction supplies, has released its financial results for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Unless specifically indicated otherwise, figures are in millions. The company did not provide specific numbers in this announcement.
U.S. Bancorp announces Q4 2025 financial results.

data.title: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) to announce Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 3, 2026, before NY Stock Exchange opening; hosting call at 11 am ET. Webcast available.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on the NYSE as ETN, is set to reveal its Q4 2025 earnings on February 3, 2026, prior to the opening of the NYSE. The company will conduct a conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to review the financial results for the period. Interested parties can join the call through a live webcast accessible via the Eaton website at www.eaton.co.
